title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!
